title: ACES Scenario Pack — Provenance (v0)
description: Records where a pack's content originated, who owns it, its scrub status, and its adoption impact. Records references only: it must not copy private source content, real credentials, operator tokens, private hosts, or customer data.

packId.description: Pack this provenance record applies to.

sources.description: Where the pack's content originated, expressed as references.

origin.description: Named origin of the content (a repository or authored-here marker).

ref.description: A non-sensitive reference (path or identifier), never copied private content.

note.description: Short adoption note about this source.

scrubStatus.description: Whether downstream-private names, paths, labels, statuses, and assumptions have been scrubbed.

ownership.description: Which boundary owns the content (ACES core, this repository, or a consumer).

adoptionImpact.description: Impact on downstream adoption, in ACES-native terms.
